body:
This PR deletes `TD.PhasePartition` from our interface everywhere but in 0M microphysics. It requires Thermodynamics v12.14 (to have `cp_m(qt, ql, qi)`). This should not be a breaking change for the downstream Atmos and KiD, because I have already updated the code there.

See relevant PRs:
- https://github.com/CliMA/Thermodynamics.jl/pull/256
- https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl/pull/3880
- https://github.com/CliMA/KinematicDriver.jl/pull/205

labels.description: We should be doing something else
labels.name: Bikeshedding :bike: :house:

title: Wip on deleting PP from microphysics interface
